title: Gaming console for simultaneously enabling active and passive participation
abstract: This disclosure relates generally to gaming systems and, more specifically, to gaming systems for use in casinos. Even more specifically, this disclosure relates to systems that enable one or more players, who wager on the outcome of a game, to actively participate in the game and one or more other individuals, who do not actively participate in the game, to wager on the outcome of the game. A gaming station and a wagering station may be incorporated into the same gaming console, with the wagering station positioned behind a portion of the gaming station that is to be occupied by an active participant in a game. Each gaming console may include a public display monitor that may provide passive participants in the game and passersby with a wide view of the game. Gaming consoles may be grouped together such that their public display monitors may collectively provide different portions of such a wide view of the game.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed: 1. A gaming system, comprising: a central gaming unit capable of: executing a game capable of being played by at least one active participant and wagered on by at least one passive participant; receiving a wager and enable active game play by the at least one active participant; and receiving a wager from the at least one passive participant; a plurality of gaming stations in communication with the central gaming unit, each gaming station of the plurality of gaming stations including: a monitor for providing an output by the central gaming unit from a perspective unique to an active participant at that gaming station; and at least one input device for communicating gaming inputs by the active participant at that gaming station to the central gaming unit; a plurality of wagering stations in communication with the central gaming unit, each wagering station of the plurality of wagering stations being accessible by a passive participant without interfering with an occupant of any of the plurality of gaming stations, each wagering station of the plurality of wagering stations including: at least one input for receiving a wager on the game and communicating the wager to the central gaming unit; and a public display system in communication with the central gaming unit, the public display system being visible to individuals not occupying any of the plurality of gaming stations, including the at least one passive participant. 2. The gaming system of claim 1, wherein the central gaming unit is capable of executing a game comprising a multiplayer competitive game. 3. The gaming system of claim 2, wherein the multiplayer competitive game comprises a sports game. 4. The gaming system of claim 3, wherein the sports game comprises a racing game. 5. The gaming system of claim 2, wherein the multiplayer competitive game comprises a shooter game, a fighter game or a dancing game. 6. The gaming system of claim 1, wherein the plurality of gaming stations are grouped together. 7. The gaming system of claim 6, wherein the public display system is positioned above the plurality of gaming stations. 8. The gaming system of any of claims 1, 6, and 7, wherein the monitor of each gaming station of the plurality of gaming stations is positioned at a front of a compartment to be occupied by an individual. 9. The gaming system of claim 8, wherein the compartment comprises a seat. 10. The gaming system of claim 9, wherein the compartment comprises a cockpit. 11. The gaming system of claim 8, wherein a wagering station of the plurality of wagering stations is located behind the compartment. 12. The gaming system of claim 11, wherein the wagering station is integrated into a corresponding gaming station. 13. The gaming system of claim 12, wherein the compartment of each gaming station comprises a seat. 14. The gaming system of claim 13, wherein the at least one input of the wagering station is located behind the seat. 15. The gaming system of any of claims 1 and 6-14, wherein the perspective unique to the active participant provided by the monitor of each gaming station of the 

 plurality of gaming stations comprises a perspective representative of a view of an individual from a virtual location of the active participant in the game. 16. The gaming system of claim 15, wherein the central gaming unit is capable of displaying the game on the public display system from a different perspective than a perspective of the game displayed by the monitor of each gaming station. 17. The gaming system of claim 16, wherein the different perspective with which the central gaming unit causes the game to be displayed by the public display system comprises a wide field view from which an avatar corresponding to each contestant in the game is visible. 18. The gaming system of claim 16, wherein the different perspective with which the central gaming unit causes the game to be displayed by the public display system comprises a perspective of a location of a spectator of the game. 19. A gaming console, comprising: a gaming station, including: a compartment capable of being occupied by an occupant comprising an active participant in a game; a monitor in front of the compartment for displaying the game from a perspective of the occupant of the compartment from a virtual location within the game; at least one input for communicating gaming inputs by the occupant of the compartment; and a wagering station behind the gaming station, the wagering station being accessible by an individual comprising a passive participant in the game without interfering with the occupant of the compartment of the gaming station, the wagering station including: at least one input for receiving a wager on the game. 20. The gaming console of claim 19, further comprising: a public display monitor positioned over the monitor and visible over the compartment of the gaming station and over an occupant of the compartment. 21. The gaming console of claim 20, wherein the public display monitor displays the game from a broad perspective, the broad perspective being different from the perspective of the occupant displayed by the monitor of the gaming station. 22. The gaming system of claim 21, wherein the broad perspective with which the public display monitor displays the at least a portion of the game comprises a perspective of a location of a spectator of the game. 23. The gaming system of claim 21 or claim 22, wherein the public display monitor displays only a portion of the game from the broad perspective, other portions of the game capable of being displayed by public display monitors or one or more adjacent gaming systems. 24. The gaming system of any of claims 19-23, wherein the compartment comprises a seat. 25. The gaming system of claim 24, wherein the compartment comprises a cockpit. 26. The gaming system of claim 24, wherein the wagering station is located behind the seat.
